conservative.name: The Final Transmutation
conservative.requirements:
12 power
Engaged with target base metal. This spell takes about an hour to cast

success.description: You produce up to 8 ounces of gold (enough to make 10 gold coins)
You produce up to 1 pound of gold (enough to make about 20 gold coins)

chaosStar.description: The gold is flawed and tarnished; impure. You can hope no one noticed the difference, or you can use traditional smelting to remove the impurities and recoup about 75% of the gold transmuted

reckless.name: The Final Transmutation
reckless.requirements:
10 power
Target within medium range. You throw a gold coin at the target when you cast this spell; the gold coin is consumed

success.description: You cast the spell and the target becomes a statue
As above, and add 2 recharge tokens to this action

chaosStar.description: You are affected in exactly the same way as the target

sigmarsComet.description: If the target dies while affected by this spell, he'll never turn back to flesh and blood, but remain gold forever
